message:
Batch SIMD string columns: one-big-string + slice() + TextDecoder

Your idea: ONE WASM call SIMD-converts ALL strings into contiguous
UTF-16 buffer, JS creates ONE big string via TextDecoder('utf-16le'),
then .slice() each substring (zero-copy sliced strings in V8/JSC).

TextDecoder is 1.8x faster than chunked fromCharCode for bulk UTF-16.

Real string usage (String().length): 5.01x → 1.59x vs JSON.parse
Non-string props: 0.92x (8% FASTER than JSON.parse)
Single number prop: 0.79x (21% FASTER than JSON.parse)
